Package org.eventb.core.ast

Class GivenType

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.Type
org.eventb.core.ast.GivenType
public class GivenType extends Type
Denotes a type defined by the user. For instance, this type can correspond to a carrier-set declared in a context.
Since:
1.0

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Description copied from class: Type
      Indicates whether the given object denotes the same type as this one.

      Comparison is done using deep equality, not reference equality.

      Specified by:
      equals in class Type
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this type denotes the same type as the obj argument, false otherwise
